response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class

We can create a UdpClient instance and send a packet to the server

We can then measure the time taken for the packet to be received

We can also check if the packet was received by checking the received bytes

We can also handle exceptions that may occur during the process

This method is efficient and provides accurate timing data

We can also use the Stopwatch class to measure the time taken
